description: Copy of a court record from the Pumbedita Yeshiva under Sharira Gaon, October 997 CE (Heshvan 1309 Seleucid). The event was in Baghdad and the copy was made in Fustat with the signatures of two people from Fustat. Regarding a will and inheritance. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #29) VMR
description_he: העתק רשומת בית דין מישיבת פומבדיתא תחת שרירא גאון, אוקטובר 997, על צוואה וירושה
